description: Supports physical machines with hardware-specific drivers and integrates with Compute.
name: Bare Metal Provisioning (ironic)

description: Used by the OpenStack Operator during bare-metal node provisioning.
name: OpenStack bare-metal provisioning operator

description: Provides and manages persistent block storage volumes for virtual machine instances.
name: Block Storage (cinder)

description: Provides compute resource provisioning through libvirt or ironic drivers.
name: Compute (nova)

description: Provides a browser-based dashboard for cloud resources and user access.
name: Dashboard (horizon)

description: Provides DNS as a service and a REST API integrated with Networking and Identity.
name: DNS (designate)

description: Provides authentication, authorization, users, projects, and roles.
name: Identity (keystone)

description: Stores virtual machine images and volume snapshots.
name: Image (glance)

description: Provides secure storage and management of secrets, keys, and certificates.
name: Key Management (barbican)

description: Provides load balancing as a service for cloud workloads.
name: Load balancing (octavia)

description: Deploys and manages MariaDB Galera clusters for RHOSO infrastructure.
name: MariaDB

description: Provides infrastructure caching support.
name: Memcached

description: Provides networking as a service for virtual compute environments.
name: Networking (neutron)

description: Provides durable object storage for unstructured data.
name: Object Storage (swift)

description: Deploys and manages OVN infrastructure.
name: OVN

description: Provides template-based orchestration of cloud resource stacks.
name: Orchestration (heat)

description: Installs and manages OpenStack Placement.
name: Placement (placement)

description: Deploys and manages RabbitMQ clusters for RHOSO infrastructure.
name: RabbitMQ

description: Provisions shared file systems for virtual machines, bare-metal nodes, and containers.
limitations: NFS versions earlier than 4.1 for CephFS-NFS back ends
name: Shared File Systems (manila)

description: Collects usage data for billing, monitoring, and alerts.
name: Telemetry (ceilometer, prometheus)
